response.justification: Strong foundational software engineer with staff-level leadership experience and a directly relevant current role building MCP frameworks and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, critically falls short of the core requirement: the position explicitly requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and this candidate has approximately one month of AI-specific experience following a recent pivot from general software engineering. The current role shows promise but is too recent to validate shipping capabilities in the GenAI domain. Python is also absent from listed skills despite being required.
strengths: Currently building MCP frameworks and agentic workflows at re:cinq—directly aligned with job's AI infrastructure and multi-agent system focus
20 years of software engineering across multiple staff-level roles with demonstrated technical leadership, mentoring, and infrastructure expertise (AWS CDK, microservices at scale)
Strong foundational engineering: full-stack capability, cloud platform experience, data pipeline work at Dunnhumby, and open-source project ownership showing production-grade standards
concerns: Severe experience gap: job requires 8+ years of production-grade AI solutions; candidate has ~1 month in AI-specific role following a career-long pivot from general software development
Python not mentioned despite being a required language for AI development; no mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization techniques
AI domain too recent to demonstrate shipping complex production systems: current role started April 2025 with no evidence of delivered GenAI products at scale or customer deployment experience
